title: Single cell short- and long-read RNA-sequencing of iNeurons in Fragile-X and control cell-lines
author: Rajib Schubert
content: E-MTAB-16805 Single cell short- and long-read RNA-sequencing of iNeurons in Fragile-X and control cell-lines RNA-seq of coding RNA from single cells EFO EFO_0005684 Homo sapiens This study benchmarks bulk and single-cell long-read RNA sequencing technologies in a human neuronal model of Fragile X
